positive: A vibrant, geometric depiction of a cosmic forest biome. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, bioluminescent trees with clean, contrasting silhouettes against a deep indigo nebula background. Interspersed among the trees are floating geometric celestial bodies and abstract constellations rendered in neon cyan and magenta. The composition should be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, emphasizing symmetry and strong, graphic lines. Use a clean vector art style mixed with digital abstract painting techniques. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, with light sources emanating primarily from the flora and background elements. The overall aesthetic must be high contrast, print-friendly, and visually pop on textile material. Minimal detail in the background to maintain clean edges for apparel printing. Flat lay perspective, perfect symmetry, 8k, crisp lines, graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, low detail, signature, gradient, photorealistic, ugly
